name: OmopMedicationStatementDrugExposureView
title: MedicationStatement → drug_exposure (flat)
description: Patient self-reported medication events. Each MedicationStatement produces one drug_exposure row with drug_type_concept_id defaulting to 44787730 (Patient Self-Reported Medication). This is the only FHIR medication resource with a normative HL7 IG FML mapping. Dynamic type concept adjustment is possible based on basedOn/partOf references (omoponfhir behavior).

column.name: person_id
column.description: Resolve Patient reference. HL7 IG FML leaves this as a commented-out TODO.

column.name: drug_concept_id
column.description: RxNorm / ATC / NDC mapped to OMOP standard concept. HL7 IG FML maps from medication.concept.coding.code. Placeholder: 0 when concept lookup unavailable.

column.name: drug_exposure_start_date
column.description: Tertiary fallback chain unique to MedicationStatement. omoponfhir falls back to new Date() instead of dateAsserted. — transform: effectiveDateTime -> effectivePeriod.start -> dateAsserted (tertiary fallback)

column.name: drug_exposure_end_date
column.description: When effectiveDateTime is used, end = start. When effectivePeriod has start but no end, end = start. — transform: effectivePeriod.end; fallback to start_date when effectiveDateTime is used (point in time) or period.end is absent

column.name: drug_exposure_end_datetime
column.description: Full ISO datetime. Null if no period end.

column.name: verbatim_end_date
column.description: Raw end date from source before any inference. HL7 IG FML maps effectivePeriod.end here. Most other implementations leave null.

column.name: stop_reason
column.description: Reason for discontinuation. omoponfhir truncates to 20 chars and only populates when status=stopped. HL7 IG FML maps from reason.concept.coding.code.

column.name: quantity
column.description: Dose amount per administration. ETL-German computes mean of Range when doseRange is used.

column.name: route_concept_id
column.description: SNOMED route code mapped to OMOP Route domain concept. omoponfhir performs full vocabulary lookup. ETL-German uses date-aware concept lookup. This project hardcodes null.

column.name: route_source_value
column.description: Raw route text. omoponfhir prefers route.text, falls back to coding[0].display.

column.name: provider_id
column.description: Reporter of the medication statement. omoponfhir filters to Practitioner-typed references only. ETL-German does not map provider for MedicationStatement.

column.name: visit_occurrence_id
column.description: Encounter reference. R4 uses 'context'; renamed to 'encounter' in R5.

column.name: drug_source_value
column.description: Best code by vocabulary priority. omoponfhir uses identifier.value as source value. ETL-German uses ATC code.

column.name: dose_unit_source_value
column.description: Raw dose unit string. omoponfhir prefers .code, falls back to .unit.
